entrypoint_command: UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=artifacts/root/venv uv run --python 3.11 python -c "from pathlib import Path; from bijux_phylogenetics.evidence.book import write_evidence_book_index; write_evidence_book_index(Path('.'))"

rendered-figure equivalence is still outside the current teaching trust claim
supported_scope: regenerate the governed teaching and migration summaries from the checked-in evidence bundle and study indexes
